# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Files Upload
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents to wp-content/uploads/user-files/.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: OpenAI
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class UFU_User_Files_Upload {
    private $option_name = 'ufu_allowed_mime_types';
    private $meta_key = 'ufu_uploaded_files';

    public function __construct() {
        add_shortcode('user_files_upload', array($this, 'render_shortcode'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_upload'));
    }

    public function get_upload_dir() {
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $base_dir = trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . 'user-files/';
        $base_url = trailingslashit($upload_dir['baseurl']) . 'user-files/';

        if (!file_exists($base_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($base_dir);
        }

        return array(
            'dir' => $base_dir,
            'url' => $base_url,
        );
    }

    public function get_allowed_mimes() {
        return array(
            'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
            'png' => 'image/png',
            'gif' => 'image/gif',
            'webp' => 'image/webp',
            'pdf' => 'application/pdf',
            'doc' => 'application/msword',
            'docx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'txt' => 'text/plain',
        );
    }

    public function render_shortcode() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You must be logged in to upload files.</p>';
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $files = get_user_meta($user_id, $this->meta_key, true);
        if (!is_array($files)) {
            $files = array();
        }

        ob_start();

        if (isset($_GET['ufu_status'])) {
            $status = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['ufu_status']));
            if ($status === 'success') {
                echo '<p>File uploaded successfully.</p>';
            } elseif ($status === 'error') {
                echo '<p>There was an error uploading the file.</p>';
            } elseif ($status === 'invalid') {
                echo '<p>Invalid file type.</p>';
            }
        }

        echo '<form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">';
        wp_nonce_field('ufu_upload_file_action', 'ufu_upload_file_nonce');
        echo '<p><input type="file" name="ufu_user_file" required></p>';
        echo '<p><input type="submit" name="ufu_upload_submit" value="Upload File"></p>';
        echo '</form>';

        if (!empty($files)) {
            echo '<h3>Your Uploaded Files</h3><ul>';
            foreach ($files as $file) {
                $name = isset($file['name']) ? esc_html($file['name']) : '';
                $url = isset($file['url']) ? esc_url($file['url']) : '';
                if ($url) {
                    echo '<li><a href="' . $url . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">' . $name . '</a></li>';
                }
            }
            echo '</ul>';
        }

        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    public function handle_upload() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return;
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['ufu_upload_submit'])) {
            return;
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['ufu_upload_file_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['ufu_upload_file_nonce'])), 'ufu_upload_file_action')) {
            return;
        }

        if (!isset($_FILES['ufu_user_file']) || empty($_FILES['ufu_user_file']['name'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_status('error');
        }

        $file = $_FILES['ufu_user_file'];

        if (!isset($file['error']) || $file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $this->redirect_with_status('error');
        }

        $allowed_mimes = $this->get_allowed_mimes();
        $check = wp_check_filetype_and_ext($file['tmp_name'], $file['name'], $allowed_mimes);

        if (empty($check['ext']) || empty($check['type'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_status('invalid');
        }

        $upload_info = $this->get_upload_dir();
        $original_name = sanitize_file_name(wp_unslash($file['name']));
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $filename = wp_unique_filename($upload_info['dir'], $user_id . '-' . time() . '-' . $original_name);
        $destination = $upload_info['dir'] . $filename;

        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            $this->redirect_with_status('error');
        }

        $file_url = $upload_info['url'] . $filename;

        $saved_files = get_user_meta($user_id, $this->meta_key, true);
        if (!is_array($saved_files)) {
            $saved_files = array();
        }

        $saved_files[] = array(
            'name' => $original_name,
            'file' => $filename,
            'url' => esc_url_raw($file_url),
            'type' => sanitize_text_field($check['type']),
            'uploaded_at' => current_time('mysql'),
        );

        update_user_meta($user_id, $this->meta_key, $saved_files);

        $this->redirect_with_status('success');
    }

    private function redirect_with_status($status) {
        $redirect_url = wp_get_referer();
        if (!$redirect_url) {
            $redirect_url = home_url('/');
        }
        $redirect_url = add_query_arg('ufu_status', $status, $redirect_url);
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect_url);
        exit;
    }
}

new UFU_User_Files_Upload();
